also_known_as: デヴィッド・アイアコノ
biography: David Iacono is an American actor and model. On television, he is best known for his role in the Amazon Prime series The Summer I Turned Pretty (2022–2023). He is known for his work on Cinnamon (2023) and Dead Boy Detectives (2024).
name: David Iacono
place_of_birth: Brooklyn, New York City, New York, USA
